MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Jerome Yalon, Esq. for Plaintiff: Discover Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Julie Orr.
9:35 a.m. Counsel present,
Exhibit 1-Declaration of Robert Adkins presented in open court-----------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Principal $13,447.67
Prejudgment Interest $1,165.42
Attorney's Fees $1,675.00
Costs $345.50
Total $16,633.59
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.
